hero.title: Build Your Digital Empire, Stress-Free.
hero.subtitle: The most secure, scalable SaaS engine designed for local merchants in Bangladesh. Launch your storefront, manage social orders, and grow your business with Nishchinte.

features.title: Everything you need to grow
features.subtitle: From social media integration to automated inventory, we handle the complexity so you can focus on sales.

items.description: Leverage AI to write product descriptions, optimize ads, and engage with customers.
